message:
test(fcp-core): pin OperationRateLimitScope serde tag (capability scope analogue)

Adds crates/fcp-core/tests/capability_scope_serde_tag.rs (~113 LOC)
pinning the JSON and CBOR wire vocabulary for fcp-core's exported
capability-scope enum.

No type literally named `CapabilityScope` exists in fcp-core. The closest
analogue exposed by the capability module is `OperationRateLimitScope`,
carried by `RateLimit::scope`. This test locks its serde tag table per
variant so cross-language consumers can rely on stable wire spellings:

  * Per-variant JSON tag table (snake_case)
  * Per-variant CBOR tag table (Text major type, length prefix bytes)
  * JSON ↔ CBOR cross-format round-trip equality
  * Strict unknown-tag rejection

Closes flywheel_connectors-okv8u (Pin fcp-core CapabilityScope serde tag).
